prompts.text: I'm 23, just started my first job in India, and want to invest ₹500 a month. Which app should I start with so I don't get overwhelmed?
Between Groww and Zerodha, which is better in 2026 for long-term index fund investing for a typical Indian salaried professional?
For everyday UPI payments and bill payments in India in 2026, is Paytm still a good choice or have PhonePe and others become better?
Best payment gateway stack for an early-stage Indian SaaS startup in 2025-26 that needs subscriptions, one-time payments, refunds, and good developer docs?
Among Groww, Zerodha, Razorpay, PhonePe, Paytm, CRED, and Slice, which brands have the strongest long-term moat in Indian fintech as of 2026, and why?
